subcodes.first_line: The Call of the Most Exalted Pen is raised at all times, and the Tongue of Grandeur speaketh in every season, and the Sun of the Beauty of the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندای قلم اعلی در کل حین مرتفع و لسان عظمت در جمیع اوان متکلم و شمس جمال محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God as sun
